[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Kylan DuPre''' was a [[Quartermaster/Legends|quartermaster]] aboard the [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrilan]] Home Fleet's ship, the ''[[Stormstrike]]''. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he saved [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]] during an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attack. Thus, he came under the service of Admiral Drayson, and went on to serve as his chief aide.<ref name="TLCS" /> During the [[Siege of Coruscant]], Leia tried to contact him to warn the officers that [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] had identified the point in space where [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] was about to bring two [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] out of hyperspace. The lieutenant was unfortunately unavailable via [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial's]] tactic went unnoticed by the military commanders.<ref name="TLC">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>
